title: 22-Can （15L）Large Lunch Bag, Foldable Cooler Bag, Insulated Bag, suitable for office workers, camping, barbecuing, family outdoor activities.
features: INSULATION PERFORMANCE: Double-layered thermal insulation of EPE foam and aluminum foil keeps food and drinks hot or cold for hours, perfect for work lunches and outdoor activities
PORTABLE DESIGN: Adjustable shoulder strap and reinforced handles make it comfortable to carry, with a lightweight yet durable construction

SPACIOUS INTERIOR: Main compartment easily fits multiple food containers, drinks, and snacks for a full day's worth of meals. Product dimensions of the large size are 11-1/2”L X 8-1/4”W X 10-1/4”H, with capacity of approximately 4.2 gallon, which can hold approximately 22 cans of 330ml coke
EASY MAINTENANCE: Water-resistant exterior wipes clean easily, while the smooth interior lining prevents leaks and spills. It is indeed built for daily use
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for daily work lunches, picnics, beach trips, and various indoor or outdoor activities where temperature control is needed
description: Insulated Lunch Box Cooler Bag Lunch bag suitable for work, picnics, beaches and travels

specifications_table.Manufacturer: ‎Shenzhen Yishuntong Cross - border E - commerce Co., Ltd.
